display.purpose: Homepage name only. The single largest thing on the site.

headline.purpose: Prose h2 in posts and pages.

title.purpose: Prose h3 and smaller section headings.

body.purpose: Long-form reading — Source Serif 4 at a comfortable measure.

label.purpose: Nav links and the two homepage section labels. Used sparingly.

logbook.purpose: Everything about an entry — N°, dates, filenames — in Geist Mono.

motion.name: home-reveal
motion.purpose: The single considered motion moment — homepage name → bio → columns. Disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header/footer text link; active state is a fern underline, hover shifts to accent.
components.html: PostsWorkAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 34px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #22261f; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { color: #2a5a43; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #2a5a43; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1.5px; text-underline-offset: 6px; }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: 30px circular control; cycles light → dark → system. Border and icon shift to accent on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-theme-toggle" aria-label="Theme: Light. Switch to Dark."><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4.2"/><path d="M12 2.5v2M12 19.5v2M2.5 12h2M19.5 12h2M5.2 5.2l1.4 1.4M17.4 17.4l1.4 1.4M18.8 5.2l-1.4 1.4M6.6 17.4l-1.4 1.4"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(34,38,31,0.12); color: #5e6459; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-theme-toggle:hover, .ds-theme-toggle:focus-visible { color: #2a5a43; border-color: #2a5a43; outline: none; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Charcoal code surface with an in-family syntax palette (moss keywords, warm-sand strings, grey-green comments) and a mono filename caption.
components.html:
payload.config.ts

export const config = buildConfig({
  // one paper surface, one accent
  serverURL,
})
components.css: .ds-code-block { background: #171b16; border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px 28px; } .ds-code-filename { margin: 0 0 14px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: rgba(247,245,239,0.4); } .ds-code-pre { margin: 0; overflow-x: auto; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.75; color: #e9e7e0; } .ds-kw { color: #8fb8a5; } .ds-str { color: #d9c79e; } .ds-com { color: #98a19b; }

components.name: Logbook Entry
components.description: Signature list row: a mono meta column (N° over date) beside a serif title, hairline-divided. The site's list pattern instead of cards.
components.html:
N°07
28.06Running a homelab behind a Cloudflare Tunnel
components.css: .ds-logbook-entry { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr; gap: 18px; padding: 14px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(34,38,31,0.07); text-decoration: none; } .ds-logbook-meta { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.9; color: #5e6459; } .ds-logbook-title { align-self: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.45; color: #22261f; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-logbook-entry:hover .ds-logbook-title { color: #2a5a43; }

components.name: Tag Filter
components.description: The /posts tag filter — text links, never filled pills. Active tag is accent + underline; an 'All' link resets.
components.html: Allhomelabai agentsrunning
components.css: .ds-tag-filter { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px 22px; padding-bottom: 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(34,38,31,0.09); } .ds-tag { font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #5e6459; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-tag:hover, .ds-tag:focus-visible { color: #2a5a43; } .ds-tag--active { font-weight: 500; color: #2a5a43; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1.5px; text-underline-offset: 5px; }

components.name: Post Meta Line
components.description: The logbook line above every post title: N° · date · tags, in Geist Mono. Tags are accent links; middot separators are aria-hidden.
components.html: N°07 · 28.06.2026 · homelab
components.css: .ds-meta-line { margin: 0; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #5e6459; } .ds-meta-sep { white-space: pre; } .ds-meta-tag { color: #2a5a43; text-decoration: none; } .ds-meta-tag:hover, .ds-meta-tag:focus-visible { text-decoration: underline; }

components.name: Wordmark
components.description: The mono lowercase wordmark; the .nz takes the surface accent (fern on paper).
components.css: .ds-wordmark { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; text-transform: lowercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #22261f; } .ds-wordmark-tld { color: #2a5a43; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The deliberate uppercase label used only as the two homepage rail headings; part of the logbook system, not a per-section eyebrow.
components.css: .ds-section-label { margin: 0 0 4px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(34,38,31,0.12); font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; color: #5e6459; }

narrative.overview: The site is a bound notebook. A single warm paper surface carries all the reading; charcoal appears only where the object is structural or technical — the vertical spine down the homepage, the footer, and code blocks — like the cover and binding of a physical book. That charcoal-against-paper contrast is the signature move and the only structural device. Over the top runs a logbook layer: everything about an entry (its number, dates, tech, filenames) is set small in Geist Mono, while everything in an entry is serif. The mood is quiet and editorial — the calm of a well-made magazine, not the flatness of a tool. It reads as understated, precise, and warm.
keyCharacteristics: One paper reading surface throughout; charcoal reserved for structural/technical zones only.
A mono logbook layer (N°, dates, filenames) over a serif reading layer.
Flat by default: sharp corners, hairline rules, no shadows.
Theme-aware semantic tokens that flip light↔dark in place; the accent flips fern→moss because fern fails AA on charcoal.
Restraint as identity: a single considered motion moment (the homepage reveal), and nothing else moves.

rules.name: The Structural-Charcoal Rule
rules.body: Charcoal is earned, not decorative. It appears only where the site is structural or technical — the homepage spine, the footer, and code blocks. Never add a fourth charcoal device to a page.

rules.name: The Two-Accent Rule
rules.body: Fern on paper, moss on charcoal — never the reverse. Every accent decision is settled by which surface it sits on.

rules.name: The Logbook Rule
rules.body: Everything about an entry is Geist Mono; everything in an entry is Source Serif 4. Metadata never borrows the serif; prose never borrows the mono.

rules.name: The One-Display Rule
rules.body: The clamp display scale (up to 6.75rem) is reserved for the homepage name. Two competing display moments on one page is prohibited.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces never lift with a shadow. If something needs to feel distinct, change its material (paper vs charcoal) or divide it with a hairline rule.

dos: Do reserve charcoal for structural/technical zones only — spine, footer, code.

Do style page surfaces with the semantic theme-aware tokens (bg-surface, text-body, text-muted, text-accent, bg-structural, border-hairline/rule) so light↔dark flips in place. Use the raw anchors (text-paper*, text-moss) only on the always-dark structural panels.
Do keep the logbook split absolute: mono for everything about an entry, serif for everything in it.
Do stay flat — divide with hairline rules and material contrast, never a shadow.
Do keep motion to the single homepage reveal, with its prefers-reduced-motion fallback intact.
Do verify fern holds AA on paper and moss holds AA on charcoal before using an accent on a new surface.
donts: Don't make it look like the generic dev-portfolio template — no neon-gradient hero, skill bars, or 'Full-Stack Developer' banner.
Don't make it look like a SaaS/startup marketing site — no tracked-uppercase eyebrow above every section, no hero-metric grid, no CTA-stuffed landing page.
Don't make it look like a loud personal-brand influencer page — no big face, no hustle energy, no newsletter popup.
Don't make it look like a sterile corporate blog — keep the point of view and the handmade detail.
Don't add gradient text, background-clip: text, glassmorphism, or decorative blur.
Don't use border-left/border-right side-stripes on cards or callouts, and don't reach for identical card grids.
Don't put fern text on charcoal or moss text on paper; the Two-Accent Rule is settled by surface.
Don't introduce a second display-scale heading on a page, or a fourth charcoal device.
